title: cyclosorus lanceola
intro: Cyclosorus lanceola, also known as the lanceolate fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus lanceola include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus lanceola often involve infusions, decoctions, or poultices, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic benefits.
